caption: The video captures a serene coastal scene during what appears to be either sunrise or sunset, as indicated by the warm hues of orange and yellow blending into the gray sky. The ocean is relatively calm with gentle waves lapping against the shore. In the foreground, there is a grassy area with some vegetation and two vertical posts, possibly part of a fence or marker. Three birds are seen flying across the frame, adding a sense of movement and life to the tranquil setting. The overall atmosphere is peaceful, with the soft lighting and natural elements creating a calming visual experience.
